title: UNICO - Swap header logo to new uploaded asset

requirements.summary: Add the new UNICO logo as a generated static asset and update the header logo in App.tsx to reference it.
acceptanceCriteria: The header logo image in the top bar renders the new uploaded logo and no longer references /assets/generated/1000035744.jpeg.dim_512x512.png.
The new logo file exists in frontend/public/assets/generated with the exact filename specified in the image requirements.
The logo remains visually crisp and properly contained (no stretching) at the existing displayed size (h-16 w-16).

file_operations.description: Add the generated image asset required by the BuildRequest: frontend/public/assets/generated/unico-logo-new.dim_512x512.png (sourced from the uploaded WhatsApp logo).

Update the header/top bar logo src to reference /assets/generated/unico-logo-new.dim_512x512.png instead of /assets/generated/1000035744.jpeg.dim_512x512.png, keeping the existing h-16 w-16 and object-contain styling to prevent stretching.
